# Dependencies

> **Scope**: Internal and external dependencies, including direction and coupling constraints.
> **Confidence**: Low
> **Last updated**: 2026-05-16
> **Source entries**: OBS-000

- ❓ Dependency flow should point toward stable abstractions in Core.
- ❓ Plugins and modules should avoid host-internal dependencies.
- ❓ External systems should be accessed through adapter boundaries.
